title: DOWNLOAD
body: Pick your OS. Download the FULL installer — not the edge or zip version for your first time.
code:
Platform: Windows (.exe) | Linux (.run) | Mac (.dmg)
Size:     ~1.2 GB
Includes: Java runtime (bundled)
          Gateway service
          All modules (trial)
key: Pick the FULL installer, not Edge
Java is bundled — do NOT install separately
All modules included — choose at runtime
mistakes: Installing Java separately (conflicts with bundled JRE)
